Saul cast the javelin- The javelin or spear was the emblem of regal authority; kings always had it at hand, and in ancient monuments they are always represented with it. (Clarke, Bible Commentary)

Jonathan gave his artillery- I believe this to be the only place in our language where the word artillery is not applied to cannon or ordnance. The original (keley) signifies simply instruments, and here means the bow, quiver, and arrows. (Clarke, Bible Commentary)
